source_note: AirROI comps (8 active 3BR): median TTM rev $137,467 incl. cleaning, ADR $569, calendar-occ 63% (adj-occ 77%). Base = ADR $540 / 57% calendar-occ -> ~$131k gross, ~5% condo haircut (townhome, shared pool, no private hot tub). Revenue definition INCLUDES cleaning fees.
amenities: Community pool, 3 lanais; next to Westin, walk to Anini Beach
notes: Puamana at Princeville townhome, MLS 628240. Remodeled. VDA zone = legal STR. Last sold $455,500 (Oct 2019). List $970,000. HOA covers water/sewer/trash/cable/internet/pool. No private hot tub.
